lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: Would you like to buy a nice kebab? Only one gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll give it a miss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops, I forgot to bring any money with me.

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: Come back when you have some.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think of Ali Morrisane?

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: I don't like him. He makes all these claims about being the best salesman in Gielinor, and he even has some thugs that he's hired to threaten us.

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: One of them came round here and threatened to cut my head off if I didn't cooperate with them!

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: I've also heard some rumours about them from my friend Ali in Pollnivneach...

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: Apparently he has men there as well, who have also been threatening people.

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: And it's said that they even intend to steal from the ruler of Al Kharid himself!

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: That's what I've heard. Anyway, are you sure you wouldn't like a kebab?

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the riddle.

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: No that's not right, think again.

lines.speaker: Karim
lines.text: I've got a little problem for you to solve.
